creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 148632
patch to upgrade editors/openoffice-devel to SVN revision 1626099 (4.2.0 AOO420m1 (Build 9800)) with Makefile and patch cleanups and conversion to internal saxon

Catch up to Makefile r371188, which changed the Makefile to use USES=python.
That fix was already in the previous version of this patch.
